message:
refactor(freeze): Continue Zig codegen removal

- Remove Zig branches from push_atom_value opcode
- Remove Zig branches from get_var/get_var_undef opcodes
- Remove Zig branches from throw opcode
- Remove Zig branches from put_array_el opcode

64 isZig() calls remain (down from 71), all returning false.
Verified: frozen fib benchmark produces correct result (9227465, ~25ms)
